title: Misers
content:
There was an old man of Nantucket
     Who kept all his cash in a bucket;
        But his daughter, named Nan,
        Ran away with a man -
     And as for the bucket, Nantucket.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Misers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
